headline: Trump has an AI data center problem ahead of the midterms — with no easy solutions
summary: Grassroots opposition to data centers is growing in communities across the U.S. as people blame the facilities for high utility bills.

headline: Ladenburg Thalmann Upgrades American Electric Power to Buy, Announces $148 Price Target
summary: Ladenburg Thalmann  analyst Paul Fremont   upgrades American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) from Neutral to Buy and announces $148 price target.
